limitations: No AI-attributable dollar amounts or quantified capex/R&D figures tied specifically to AI were disclosed in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 (named programs, no quantified scale).

AI narrative concreteness is primarily on the enabler/infrastructure side (Seagate as storage supplier to AI workloads) rather than Seagate deploying AI in its own products at scale with quantified results; score reflects named deployed use cases with operating detail but no quantified business outcomes.
Product development spend ($724M for FY2025) is disclosed in MD&A but not attributed to AI specifically, so not included in capex_mentions.

Risk disclosure includes company-specific mechanisms (AI-augmented cyberattacks, demand variability from AI adoption rates, reputational risk from AI usage) but no quantification or named governance bodies, supporting score of 4 rather than 5.
